title: DN40 1QR, Integrated Waste Management Limited: partial surrender issued - EPR/PP3830BV/S010
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Integrated Waste Management Limited   Installation name: Immingham Landfill Site   Permit number: EPR/PP3830BV/S010   "
